summary: PR #88581 is the only hydrated open candidate and is a useful contributor PR, but it is not merge-ready from the available preflight: mergeability is unknown, checks could not be hydrated because of a GraphQL rate-limit error, existing issue comments were not hydrated, and an earlier Codex review comment is present without evidence that all findings are resolved. Plan a contributor-branch repair/finalization path rather than merge or close.

actions.reason: Recommend branch repair/finalization before any merge recommendation: refresh against current main, hydrate and resolve human/bot comments, run validation and Codex /review, then re-evaluate merge.
Emit a fix artifact for the executor to finalize the existing contributor PR through current-main refresh, validation, review cleanup, and merge preflight generation.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair and finalize contributor PR #88581 on its existing editable branch before any merge recommendation. The executor should update against current main if needed, hydrate and address human and review-bot comments, validate the /name command implementation and tests, run Codex /review, and only then emit a complete merge preflight.
repair_candidate.pr_title: feat(commands): add /name to rename the current session from chat
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Finalizes contributor PR #88581 by BSG2000.

Plan:
- Refresh the editable contributor branch against current main if required.
- Hydrate and resolve human and review-bot comments, including the earlier Codex review.
- Validate the focused /name command path with the command test file and pnpm check:changed.
- Run Codex /review and address any findings before merge preflight.

Credit: this work is based on source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88581 by BSG2000.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for BSG2000 as the source PR author.
Keep source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88581 as the canonical contributor branch when repairing.
If a replacement PR becomes necessary later, its body must explicitly credit BSG2000 and link PR #88581 as the source PR.
